channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年07月10日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] Your family’s $300 stake in OpenAI
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s oft-discussed promise that Americ

item.title: [未译] Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
item.description: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.

item.title: [未译] Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
item.description: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.

item.title: [未译] Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
item.description: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week.

item.title: [未译] US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
item.description: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

item.title: [未译] Interest rates may need to rise this year, says Bank of England economist
item.description: Chief economist at the Bank of England says slower growth and inflationary pressures mean rate rise needed

item.title: [未译] Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
item.description: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".

item.title: [未译] Technical details need to be agreed before Ukraine can produce Patriot missiles, Zelensky says
item.description: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky on Thursday said that technical details still needed to be finalised with the US before Kyiv could start manufacturing its own Patriot air-defence missiles. Ukra

item.title: [未译] Francia es una galaxia muy, muy lejana para Marruecos y ya espera a España o Bélgica en semifinales
item.description: Mbappé, que falló un penalti, y Dembélé deciden un contundente triunfo ante los Leones del Atlas, que se vinieron abajo tras el descanso. Leer

item.title: [未译] Tensions erupt in Indian state after 11-year-old raped and murdered
item.description: The girl's body was fished out from a pond on Sunday - a day after her family reported her missing.

item.title: [未译] Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Mideast Fighting, Rate Outlook
item.description: Gold steadied, as investors weighed renewed fighting in the Middle East and the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat stubborn inflation.

item.title: [未译] JPMorgan Builds AI Agents That Beat 60/40 Portfolio in Backtests
item.description: As investors increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for help with everything from stock picking to risk management, JPMorgan Chase & Co. has been testing whether a model can do something mor

item.title: [未译] Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
item.description: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.

item.title: [未译] We saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
item.description: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

item.title: [未译] Asian Stocks Set to Gain After US Chipmakers Rally: Markets Wrap
item.description: Asian stocks looked poised to gain on Friday after a resurgence in chipmakers drove a rebound on Wall Street. Oil opened lower.

item.title: [未译] Willow Wealth CEO on Responsibly Growing Private Markets
item.description: Mitchell Caplan, CEO of Willow Wealth, discusses the evolving landscape of private market investing for individual investors. Caplan highlighted the trend of companies staying private longer, which ha

item.title: [未译] Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
item.description: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.

item.title: [未译] SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Top US Debut by a Foreign Firm
item.description: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, as the South Korean memory chipmaker powered through volatility to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a

item.title: [未译] Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
item.description: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.

item.title: [未译] Jackdaw boss warns of winter fuel shortage risk if gas field not approved
item.description: Adura says the UK government must approve North Sea production urgently to avoid domestic supply shortages.

item.title: [未译] How can I get air conditioning in my home and how much does it cost?
item.description: As summers in the UK get hotter, is it time for air conditioning to become a permanent feature in most homes?

item.title: [未译] Trump’s NATO Summit, and Everyone Else’s
item.description: While President Trump insulted allies and demanded loyalty, the military alliance moved quietly closer to accepting more European responsibility for defense.

item.title: [未译] Iran strikes US interests in Kuwait, Bahrain and Qatar in response to Washington bombings
item.description: Iran’s Health Ministry said there were 14 dead and 78 injured in the latest offensive. It also claims one projectile landed very close to a nuclear facility

item.title: [未译] Four nuclear reactors hit a big milestone in the US
item.description: I was really looking forward to July 4, and not just because I love a poolside barbecue. This year the American holiday also marked a big symbolic deadline for US nuclear power. Last year the Trump ad

item.title: [未译] Fujimori legacy shows limits of Trump’s push against China in Peru
item.description: Keiko Fujimori will have to navigate her father's legacy as U.S. President Donald Trump seeks to reassert U.S. dominance in the Western Hemisphere.

item.title: [未译] I run the UK's biggest bank, here are five ways to manage your money
item.description: The CEO of Lloyds Bank talks about how to save, budget, avoid scams and manage money in a relationship.

item.title: [未译] Why electric cars cost more to insure - and what's being done about it
item.description: The insurance cost of electric vehicles is still putting off many would-be buyers. So what can be done about it?

item.title: [未译] Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
item.description: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.

item.title: [未译] Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
item.description: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI compa

item.title: [未译] Syria arrests ISIS-linked suspects over Damascus bombings during Macron visit
item.description: Syrian authorities said on Thursday they had arrested several suspects accused of carrying out a series of bombings in Damascus, including attacks during French President Emmanuel Macron's visit this
